chapter_title: Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol
article_title: Privately Owned and Operated Ambulances and Armored Cars
text: Licenses for the operation of ambulances may be issued only to those persons or entities which operate ambulances designed and operated exclusively as such and which are used to respond to emergency calls.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2.5. Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol [2500 - 2574]
#### Article 2. Privately Owned and Operated Ambulances and Armored Cars [2510 - 2512]
##### § 2511

Licenses for the operation of ambulances may be issued only to those persons or entities which operate ambulances designed and operated exclusively as such and which are used to respond to emergency calls.

*(Added by Stats. 1968, Ch. 1309.)*

subsections.text: Licenses for the operation of ambulances may be issued only to those persons or entities which operate ambulances designed and operated exclusively as such and which are used to respond to emergency calls.
